RAW_FIVETRAN.comment: Fivetran managed ETL — writes source replicas to isolated RAW db

RAW_AIRFLOW.comment: Airflow custom ingestion pipelines — needs SELECT for incremental logic

EVENTS.comment: Snowpipe continuous load from S3 — scoped to EVENTS.SNOWPLOW only

ANALYTICS.comment: dbt production runs — reads all RAW, writes to ANALYTICS
